title: Assert `(int)lut_edges_bw[succ].size() < order' failed in passes/techmap/flowmap.cc:829
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

I'm using `Yosys 0.9+431 (git sha1 739c6213, clang 6.0.0-1ubuntu2 -fPIC -Os)`.

Using [flowmap-bug.tar.gz](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/3659171/flowmap-bug.tar.gz) run `yosys -s script.ys bugpoint-result.il`.

## Expected behavior

`flowmap` completes successfully.

## Actual behavior

```
5. Executing FLOWMAP pass (pack LUTs with FlowMap-r).
Labeling cells.
Mapped to 13 LUTs with maximum depth 3.

Optimizing area.
Relaxing with depth bound 3.
  Breaking LUT \load_idle_byteenable [2] to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:309:simplemap_lut$3638 [1] (potential -100).
  Breaking LUT \load_idle_byteenable [2] to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:309:simplemap_lut$3643 [0] (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT \load_idle_byteenable [2] to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:309:simplemap_lut$3646 (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT \load_idle_byteenable [2] to extract LUT $logic_or$/home/lofty/aoR3000/rtl/pipeline/pipeline_mem.v:343$686_Y (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT \load_idle_byteenable [1] to reuse LUT $logic_or$/home/lofty/aoR3000/rtl/pipeline/pipeline_mem.v:343$686_Y (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT \load_idle_byteenable [0] to reuse LUT $logic_or$/home/lofty/aoR3000/rtl/pipeline/pipeline_mem.v:343$686_Y (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT \load_idle_byteenable [3] to reuse LUT $logic_or$/home/lofty/aoR3000/rtl/pipeline/pipeline_mem.v:343$686_Y (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT \load_idle_byteenable [2] to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:309:simplemap_lut$3648 [3] (potential -100).
ERROR: Assert `(int)lut_edges_bw[succ].size() < order' failed in passes/techmap/flowmap.cc:829.
```

cc @whitequark
code_blocks:
5. Executing FLOWMAP pass (pack LUTs with FlowMap-r).
Labeling cells.
Mapped to 13 LUTs with maximum depth 3.

Optimizing area.
Relaxing with depth bound 3.

  Breaking LUT \load_idle_byteenable [2] to extract LUT $logic_or$/home/lofty/aoR3000/rtl/pipeline/pipeline_mem.v:343$686_Y (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT \load_idle_byteenable [1] to reuse LUT $logic_or$/home/lofty/aoR3000/rtl/pipeline/pipeline_mem.v:343$686_Y (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT \load_idle_byteenable [0] to reuse LUT $logic_or$/home/lofty/aoR3000/rtl/pipeline/pipeline_mem.v:343$686_Y (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT \load_idle_byteenable [3] to reuse LUT $logic_or$/home/lofty/aoR3000/rtl/pipeline/pipeline_mem.v:343$686_Y (potential 700).
  Breaking LUT \load_idle_byteenable [2] to extract LUT $auto$simplemap.cc:309:simplemap_lut$3648 [3] (potential -100).
ERROR: Assert `(int)lut_edges_bw[succ].size() < order' failed in passes/techmap/flowmap.cc:829.
